ddls:
CREATE TABLE "constituencies" (
  "constituency_code" TEXT /* Unique code identifier for the constituency */,
  "constituency_name" TEXT /* Name of the parliamentary constituency */,
  "constituency_type" TEXT /* Type of the constituency (e.g., England, Wales, Northern Ireland) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country (e.g., North West, South East) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the constituency */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the constituency in square kilometers */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the constituency was first established */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the constituency data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "electoral_data" (
  "constituency_code" TEXT /* Reference to the parliamentary constituency */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which the data is recorded */,
  "total_electors" INTEGER /* Total number of electors in the given year */,
  "attainers" INTEGER /* Number of attainers (individuals who have reached voting age) in the given year */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters */,
  "voter_turnout" TEXT /* Percentage of registered voters who actually voted */,
  "valid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of valid votes cast */,
  "invalid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of invalid votes cast */,
  "electoral_system" TEXT /* Type of electoral system used (e.g., First-Past-The-Post, Proportional Representation) */,
  "polling_stations" INTEGER /* Number of polling stations in the constituency */,
  "average_age" TEXT /* Average age of the electorate */,
  "gender_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of male to female electors */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of electors by ethnicity */,
  "economic_status" TEXT /* Economic status of the constituency */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level of the electorate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the electoral data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituency_code", "year")
)
